title: MCP exposure of generated COMPUTE node (close-the-loop Plan B2)
change_summary: Relaxed ServiceMCPToolSync exposure predicate (_is_mcp_orchestrator -> _is_mcp_exposable) so mcp-enabled generated COMPUTE nodes (node-type:compute + generated) surface as MCP tools alongside orchestrators, without relabeling them as orchestrators. Non-generated compute nodes and non-mcp nodes remain excluded.

tdd.red_signature: AttributeError: type object 'ServiceMCPToolSync' has no attribute 'TAG_NODE_TYPE_COMPUTE' / no attribute '_is_mcp_exposable'
